g.text: r=25% separates on CER but NOT on

text.style: font-size: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; fill: #5c5b55

g.text: tone → it does not clear the bar.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #1a1a19

g.text: The gap is monotone in the budget — and dies before full data

text.style: font-size: 7.6px; font-family: 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; fill: #5c5b55

g.text: rec-only · VinText test-500 (10,068 instances / 37,254 chars) · NFC · mean ± 95% CI over k training seeds · document-pretrained VietOCR vgg_transformer, fine-tuned; only the real-label budget and the synthetic set vary.

text.style: font-size: 7.6px; font-family: 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; fill: #5c5b55

g.text: The +synth arm is the STRICT-BANK generator at r=10% and 25% (solid marker; the corpus draws only on transcripts the budget entitles it to) and at r=100% (where the two banks are identical by construction).

text.style: font-size: 7.6px; font-family: 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; fill: #5c5b55

g.text: r=50% (hollow marker) was only run full-bank; the confound can only inflate a gap, and that gap is already nil.
